statement: ASE is boosting advanced-packaging capacity and Hanmi Semiconductor is expanding from HBM tools into advanced chip packaging, adding CoWoS packaging capacity.
why: OSAT and equipment capacity build-out for CoWoS advanced packaging eases a key AI-GPU supply bottleneck.

impact.mechanism: Added advanced-packaging capacity from ASE and new equipment entrants relieves the CoWoS bottleneck, increasing whole-chain GPU supply.

evidence.excerpt: South Korean equipment maker Hanmi Semiconductor is moving beyond high-bandwidth memory (HBM) tools into advanced chip packaging, a shift that could affect the global semiconductor supply chain. As ASE boosts capacity to meet TSMC-linked demand, Hanmi is...

confidence.basis: Single secondary source (DIGITIMES), free lede only; no capacity or wafer figures disclosed.

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: statement/trend changed (trend falling -> rising); sources: DIGITIMES
